project: Good Deeds Tracker - Blazor WASM + Azure Functions + PostgreSQL
purpose: Critical lessons learned to avoid repeating debugging pain in future AI-assisted development

lessons.issue: PostgreSQL converts unquoted column aliases to lowercase
lessons.symptom: Dapper throws 'A parameterless default constructor or one matching signature (System.Guid childid, System.Int64 points...) is required'
lessons.solution: ALWAYS use quoted identifiers in SQL column aliases: `SELECT id as "Id"` NOT `SELECT id as Id`

example.wrong: SELECT child_id as ChildId, parent_id as ParentId FROM children
example.correct: SELECT child_id as "ChildId", parent_id as "ParentId" FROM children

lessons.rule: Every SELECT/RETURNING clause must use quoted aliases matching DTO PascalCase property names exactly

lessons.issue: PostgreSQL aggregate functions return different types than expected
lessons.symptom: sum() returns bigint (Int64) when DTO expects int (Int32)
lessons.solution: Explicitly cast aggregate results: `sum(points)::integer` or `CAST(sum(points) AS INTEGER)`
lessons.rule: Always cast PostgreSQL aggregates (sum, count, avg) to match target DTO types

lessons.issue: COALESCE with mismatched types causes cast errors
lessons.symptom: Cannot cast NULL to integer
lessons.solution: Cast COALESCE result: `COALESCE(sum(points), 0)::integer`
lessons.rule: When using COALESCE with aggregates, cast the entire expression

lessons.issue: Neon PostgreSQL includes unsupported connection string parameters
lessons.symptom: Connection fails with 'channel_binding parameter not supported'
lessons.solution: Filter connection string parameters before passing to Npgsql

example.implementation: Remove parameters from parsed connection string in ConnectionStringHelper

lessons.rule: Always validate and sanitize third-party database connection strings before using with Npgsql

lessons.issue: postgresql:// URI format vs. Npgsql connection string format
lessons.symptom: Connection string parsing errors
lessons.solution: Convert postgresql:// URIs to Npgsql format using NpgsqlConnectionStringBuilder
lessons.rule: Use ConnectionStringHelper pattern for any cloud database provider

lessons.issue: Environment variable naming is case-sensitive on Linux
lessons.symptom: DB environment variable not found, gets null
lessons.solution: Document exact case-sensitive variable name (e.g., 'DB' not 'db' or 'Db')
lessons.rule: Always specify exact environment variable casing in deployment documentation

lessons.issue: Silent catch blocks hide critical errors
lessons.symptom: UI shows 'no data' but actual error is database connection failure
lessons.solution: Always log exceptions even in catch blocks; never use empty `catch {}`
lessons.rule: Every catch block must at minimum log to console and display user-friendly message

lessons.issue: Startup errors are invisible in deployed environments
lessons.symptom: API returns 502 with no explanation
lessons.solution: Wrap Program.cs migrations and startup code in try-catch with detailed logging
lessons.rule: Add comprehensive error logging to all startup/initialization code before deployment

lessons.issue: Generic error messages hide root cause
lessons.symptom: 'Unable to create child' doesn't indicate SQL deserialization error
lessons.solution: Return actual exception messages during development, sanitize for production
lessons.rule: During development, expose full error details; use feature flags for production

lessons.issue: Relative API URLs fail without base address
lessons.symptom: Uri.IsWellFormedUriString() returns false for '/api/' causing silent failure
lessons.solution: Check if URI is relative, then construct against HostEnvironment.BaseAddress

example.correct: Uri.IsWellFormedUriString(apiBase, UriKind.Absolute) ? new Uri(apiBase) : new Uri(new Uri(builder.HostEnvironment.BaseAddress), apiBase)

lessons.rule: Always handle both absolute and relative URIs in configuration

lessons.issue: CSS specificity conflicts with Bootstrap defaults
lessons.symptom: Navigation text invisible because Bootstrap styles override custom CSS
lessons.solution: Use !important flag judiciously for critical UI elements
lessons.rule: When custom styles conflict with framework defaults, use !important with scoped CSS

lessons.issue: Component state not refreshing after async operations
lessons.symptom: Dropdown appears empty after data loads
lessons.solution: Ensure StateHasChanged() or re-render triggers after async data loads
lessons.rule: Always call StateHasChanged() after async data modifications if UI doesn't auto-update

lessons.issue: Environment variables must be set in Azure portal
lessons.symptom: API works locally but fails in production with connection errors
lessons.solution: Configure all environment variables in Static Web Apps → Settings → Environment variables
lessons.rule: Never assume local.settings.json values carry over to production

lessons.issue: Migration files must be included in deployment
lessons.symptom: Database schema missing in production
lessons.solution: Ensure sql/*.sql files are copied to output directory in .csproj
lessons.rule: Add ItemGroup with CopyToOutputDirectory for migration files

lessons.issue: Deployment takes 3+ minutes with caching
lessons.symptom: Changes don't appear immediately
lessons.solution: Wait for GitHub Actions to complete and Static Web App to refresh cache
lessons.rule: Allow 3-5 minutes for full deployment cycle; check GitHub Actions status

lessons.issue: Inconsistent parent ID sources cause data loading failures
lessons.symptom: Deed types dropdown empty because using child.ParentId instead of cached parentId
lessons.solution: Always use consistent parent ID source (from user settings cache)
lessons.rule: Establish single source of truth for user/parent context across all pages

lessons.issue: 404 responses treated as errors instead of empty lists
lessons.symptom: Error messages when no data exists yet
lessons.solution: Return empty lists for 404 responses, only throw for actual errors
lessons.rule: Distinguish between 'no data' (404) and 'error fetching data' (500)

lessons.issue: No systematic testing of CRUD operations
lessons.symptom: Bugs discovered manually through UI testing
lessons.solution: Create test scripts (like test-api.py) for programmatic endpoint validation
lessons.rule: Build API test suite before deploying to production

lessons.issue: SQL queries not tested against actual PostgreSQL before deployment
lessons.symptom: Query works in SQL editor but fails with Dapper
lessons.solution: Test all queries with Dapper locally using actual PostgreSQL database
lessons.rule: Always test ORM queries against target database engine, not just SQL syntax

lessons.issue: Missing documentation of case-sensitive requirements
lessons.symptom: Repeated issues with environment variables and SQL aliases
lessons.solution: Create CRITICAL_GOTCHAS.md with PostgreSQL-specific requirements
lessons.rule: Document platform-specific quirks prominently in project README

lessons.issue: No deployment checklist
lessons.symptom: Forgot to set environment variables during deployment
lessons.solution: Maintain deployment checklist with all required configuration
lessons.rule: Create deployment runbook before first production deploy

criticalRules: ALWAYS use quoted identifiers for PostgreSQL column aliases in SELECT/RETURNING: as "PropertyName"
ALWAYS cast PostgreSQL aggregates to match DTO types: sum(x)::integer
ALWAYS handle both absolute and relative URIs in configuration
ALWAYS log exceptions in catch blocks, even if displaying user-friendly message
ALWAYS validate cloud database connection strings and remove unsupported parameters
ALWAYS use consistent data source (e.g., cached parentId) across all API calls
ALWAYS test Dapper queries against actual PostgreSQL database before deployment
ALWAYS document environment variable names with exact casing
ALWAYS include migration files in deployment output
NEVER use empty catch blocks or silent error swallowing
NEVER assume local configuration carries over to production
NEVER skip error handling in startup/initialization code

beforeDeployment: Set all environment variables in Azure portal (case-sensitive)
Verify migration files copy to output directory
Wait 3-5 minutes for deployment + cache refresh
whenDebuggingErrors: Check browser console for JavaScript errors
Check Azure Functions logs for startup errors
Verify environment variables set correctly (exact case)
Check for silent catch {} blocks hiding errors

essentialHelpers: ParentGuard.cs - Enforce request scoping and authorization
recommendedStructure: Single Data.cs file for all database operations

aiPromptGuidelines.instruction: When starting a new project with similar stack, provide this JSON to the AI with:
aiPromptGuidelines.prompt: I'm building a Blazor WASM + Azure Functions + PostgreSQL app. Here are critical lessons learned from a previous project. Please review these lessons and proactively apply them to avoid the same issues. Pay special attention to PostgreSQL case sensitivity with Dapper, error handling patterns, and deployment configuration.
emphasis: Cast all aggregates to target types
Add comprehensive error logging before deployment
Document environment variables with exact casing
